choices.name: activateAsset
choices.choiceText: Activate Asset {!varFixedAssetName} now. Depreciation schedules will be available for processing.

choices.name: approveAsset
choices.choiceText: Leave Asset {!varFixedAssetName} in Approved Status. Depreciation can be reviewed but will not be processed.

choices.name: FAMActive
choices.choiceText: Activate Asset {!varFixedAssetName} now. Depreciation schedules will be available for processing.

formulas.name: fmlDefaultDateInService
fmlFirstScheduleDepreciationDate
formulas.expression: IF(DAY({!varDateInService})>15, ({!varDateInService} - DAY({!varDateInService}) + 80) - DAY(({!varDateInService} - DAY({!varDateInService}) + 80)), ({!varDateInService} - DAY({!varDateInService}) + 40) - DAY(({!varDateInService} - DAY({!varDateInService}) + 40)))

Flow.interviewLabel: FAM Add Depreciation to Fixed Asset {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: FAM Add Depreciation to Fixed Asset

screens.name: Confirm_Activation
screens.label: Confirm Activation

fields.name: confirmComplete
fields.fieldText: A Depreciation Book & Schedules have been created for Fixed Asset {!varFixedAssetName}. The asset can now be activated, or left as approved.

screens.helpText: The life is stored on the asset in years, but shown here as months for clarity. One depreciation schedule is created for each month of depreciation.

screens.name: Confirm_New
screens.label: Confirm (New)

fields.name: confirmNew
fields.fieldText: A Depreciation Book & Schedules for Fixed Asset {!varFixedAssetName} can now be created; please confirm the number of periods for depreciation, the start date for depreciation (asset activation) and the salvage (end of life) value for the asset:

fields.name: AssetActivationDate
fields.helpText: Depreciation schedules are 'full month' values. If the activation date is on or before 15th of the month a full schedule is created for that month, otherwise the first depreciation schedule is in the following month.

screens.helpText: The life is stored on the asset in years, but shown here as months for clarity. One depreciation schedule is created for each month of depreciation.

screens.name: Confirm_Replace_B
screens.label: Confirm (Replace Book)

fields.name: confirmNew_0_0
fields.fieldText: A Depreciation Book & Schedules for Fixed Asset {!varFixedAssetName} can now be created, replacing the existing book and adding depreciation records; please confirm the number of periods for depreciation, the start date for depreciation (asset activation) and the salvage (end of life) value for the asset:

fields.name: AssetActivationDate_Bk
fields.helpText: Depreciation schedules are 'full month' values. If the activation date is on or before 15th of the month a full schedule is created for that month, otherwise the first depreciation schedule is in the following month.

screens.helpText: The life is stored on the asset in years, but shown here as months for clarity. One depreciation schedule is created for each month of depreciation.

screens.name: Confirm_Replace_B_S
screens.label: Confirm (Replace B&S)

fields.name: confirmNew_0
fields.fieldText: A Depreciation Book & Schedules for Fixed Asset {!varFixedAssetName} can now be created, replacing the existing records; please confirm the number of periods for depreciation, the start date for depreciation (asset activation) and the salvage (end of life) value for the asset:

fields.name: AssetActivationDate_BS
fields.helpText: Depreciation schedules are 'full month' values. If the activation date is on or before 15th of the month a full schedule is created for that month, otherwise the first depreciation schedule is in the following month.

screens.helpText: The life is stored on the asset in years, but shown here as months for clarity. One depreciation schedule is created for each month of depreciation.

fields.name: errorCancelled
fields.fieldText: Fixed Asset {!varFixedAssetName} has been {!varFixedAssetStatus}, so depreciation cannot be amended/added.

fields.name: errorHasDepreciation
fields.fieldText: Fixed Asset {!varFixedAssetName} has already started depreciation, so new schedules cannot be created.

fields.name: errorNotApproved
fields.fieldText: Fixed Asset {!varFixedAssetName} has not yet been approved. Depreciation cannot be added/amended until the Asset is approved.
